series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Information Technology Policy Supporting Documents
series_metadata.series_description: This series includes copies of Correspondence, Drafts, Research, Work group collections to include rosters, minutes, surveys, review drafts and recommendations, Project plans, CIO Release for comment, Request to publish, Publication requests and notifications, Inquiries and Waivers and News releases.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain project packet in office area for five years after Ohio IT policy document it supports is superseded or rescinded, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain project packet in office area for five years after Ohio IT policy document it supports is superseded or rescinded, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
